name: quick view button guardian profile
script: // frappe.listview\_settings['Guardian Profile'] = { // refresh: function(listview) { // if (listview.quick\_view\_button\_added) return; // listview.page.add\_inner\_button(\_\_('Quick View Selected'), function () { // let selected = listview.get\_checked\_items(); // if (selected.length !== 1) { // frappe.msgprint("Select exactly one Guardian."); // return; // } // let guardian\_name = selected[0].name; // frappe.db.get\_doc("Guardian Profile", guardian\_name).then(async function (guardian) { // let html = ` //  // ###, ${guardian.guardian\_name}  //  //|// **Email** |// ${guardian.email\_address || ""} |// //|// **Mobile** |// ${guardian.mobile\_number || ""} |// //|// **Occupation** |// ${guardian.occupation || ""} |// // //   ---   // ###, Children  // `; // if (!guardian.students || guardian.students.length === 0) { // html += "  No Students Linked.  "; // } else { // for (let row of guardian.students) { // try { // let student = await frappe.db.get\_doc("Custom Student", row.student); // html += ` //  //  //  // ![](${student.image || '/assets/frappe/images/ui/avatar.png'}) //  //  // ###, ${student.student\_name}  //  //|// **Admission No** |// ${student.name} |// //|// **Program** |// ${student.current\_program || ""} |// //|// **Academic Year** |// ${student.current\_academic\_year || ""} |// //|// **Roll No** |// ${student.roll\_no || ""} |// //|// **Mobile** |// ${student.student\_mobile\_number || ""} |// // //  //  //  // `; // } catch (e) { // html += `  Unable to load Student : ${row.student}  `; // } // } // } // html += ""; // let d = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ // title: guardian.guardian\_name, // size: "extra-large", // fields: [ // { // fieldtype: "HTML", // fieldname: "preview" // } // ], // primary\_action\_label: "Open Full Form", // primary\_action() { // d.hide(); // frappe.set\_route("Form", "Guardian Profile", guardian\_name); // } // }); // d.fields\_dict.preview.$wrapper.html(html); // d.show(); // }); // }); // listview.quick\_view\_button\_added = true; // } // }; frappe.listview\_settings['Guardian Profile'] = { refresh: function(listview) { if (listview.quick\_view\_button\_added) return; listview.page.add\_inner\_button(\_\_('Quick View Selected'), function () { let selected = listview.get\_checked\_items(); if (selected.length !== 1) { frappe.msgprint("Select exactly one Guardian."); return; } let guardian\_name = selected[0].name; frappe.db.get\_doc("Guardian Profile", guardian\_name).then(async function (guardian) { let html = ` ###, ${guardian.guardian\_name}  | **Email** | ${guardian.email\_address || ""} | | --- | --- | | **Mobile** | ${guardian.mobile\_number || ""} | | **Occupation** | ${guardian.occupation || ""} |  ---  ###, Children  `; if (!guardian.students || guardian.students.length === 0) { html += "  No Students Linked.  "; } else { for (let row of guardian.students) { try { let student = await frappe.db.get\_doc("Custom Student", row.student); let class\_teacher\_name = student.class\_teacher || ""; if (student.class\_teacher) { try { let teacher\_doc = await frappe.db.get\_value( "Instructor", student.class\_teacher, "instructor\_name" ); class\_teacher\_name = (teacher\_doc.message && teacher\_doc.message.instructor\_name) ? teacher\_doc.message.instructor\_name : student.class\_teacher; } catch (e) { class\_teacher\_name = student.class\_teacher; } } html += ` ![](${student.image || '/assets/frappe/images/ui/avatar.png'})  ###, ${student.student\_name}  | **Admission No** | ${student.name} | | --- | --- | | **Program** | ${student.current\_program || ""} | | **Academic Year** | ${student.current\_academic\_year || ""} | | **Section** | ${student.section || student.section\_name || ""} | | **Class Teacher** | ${class\_teacher\_name} | | **Roll No** | ${student.roll\_no || ""} | | **Mobile** | ${student.student\_mobile\_number || ""} |     `; } catch (e) { html += `  Unable to load Student : ${row.student}  `; } } } html += ""; let d = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ title: guardian.guardian\_name, size: "extra-large", fields: [ { fieldtype: "HTML", fieldname: "preview" } ], primary\_action\_label: "Open Full Form", primary\_action() { d.hide(); frappe.set\_route("Form", "Guardian Profile", guardian\_name); } }); d.fields\_dict.preview.$wrapper.html(html); d.show(); }); }); listview.quick\_view\_button\_added = true; } };
